name: Apollo.io
description: Drive Apollo.io (B2B sales platform with contact database + enrichment + sequences) from any AI agent: people search, organization search, contact CRUD, deal stages, sequences. 11 tools.
instructions:
This connector uses the Apollo.io API v1 (docs.apollo.io).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to Apollo.io → top-right avatar → **Settings → Integrations → API → API Keys → Create New API Key**.
2. Name it ('AnythingMCP'). Copy the key.
3. Set `APOLLO_API_KEY`.

**Authentication**: header `X-Api-Key: ${APOLLO_API_KEY}`. (Note: Apollo also supports the api_key query parameter and the legacy `Authorization` header; this connector uses the header form.)

**Search vs Enrich**: Apollo's central feature is searching its 275M+ people database (`/v1/mixed_people/search`). `match` endpoints enrich a known person/company by email/domain. People search is the entry point for prospecting workflows.

**Credits model**: every `enrich`, `mixed_people/search` result, and reveal-email/phone call costs API credits. Read your plan's credit balance before bulk operations. Apollo returns `429 quota exceeded` (NOT a normal 429) when credits run out.

**Email reveal mechanics**: searching returns 'unrevealed' contacts with email=null. To get the email, call `apollo_people_enrich` for that specific person — that consumes credits. Plan accordingly.

**Sequences**: Apollo's outreach engine. Pulling contacts via search → adding them to a sequence is the most common write flow. Cadences are configured in the UI; the API just adds/removes contacts.

**Filters**: people search accepts many filters — person_titles, person_locations, organization_num_employees_ranges, organization_industry_tag_ids, contact_email_status, etc. The adapter exposes the most common.

**Pagination**: 1-based `page` parameter, `per_page` max 100. `pagination.total_pages` tells you when to stop.

**Rate limits**: per plan — varies wildly. Enterprise has multi-thousand req/min, Starter much lower. On 429 honor `Retry-After`.

**Out of scope here**: lead-scoring config, sequence template editing, conversation intelligence, plays/dispositions, billing.

tools.name: apollo_search_people
tools.description: Search Apollo's 275M+ contact database. Apollo's flagship feature. Returns paginated people matches with title, organization, location, seniority — email is null unless you enrich (consumes credits). Use filters aggressively to narrow before enriching.

q_keywords.description: Free-text search across name, title, company.

person_titles.description: Array of title strings — e.g. ['CTO','VP Engineering'].

person_locations.description: Array of location strings — e.g. ['San Francisco, CA','Germany'].

person_seniorities.description: founder, c_suite, partner, vp, head, director, manager, senior, entry, intern.

organization_industry_tag_ids.description: Apollo industry tag IDs (discover via Apollo UI's industry filter).

tools.name: apollo_people_enrich
tools.description: Enrich a person — provide ONE of email / first_name+last_name+organization_name / linkedin_url / id. Returns full profile including verified email (and often phone). CONSUMES CREDITS.

reveal_personal_emails.description: If true, also reveal personal email if found (extra credit cost).

reveal_phone_number.description: If true, reveal mobile/work phone (extra credits, slower 401 if your plan doesn't include phones).

tools.name: apollo_search_organizations
tools.description: Search Apollo's company database. Returns paginated organizations with industry, employee count, technologies used, funding, location.

technology_uids.description: Apollo tech UIDs (e.g. 'salesforce', 'hubspot' — find via tech filter in UI).

tools.name: apollo_organization_enrich
tools.description: Enrich an organization — provide domain (most common) OR id. Returns full org profile with technographics, funding, employee count, contact patterns.

tools.name: apollo_search_contacts
tools.description: Search YOUR Apollo CRM contacts (people already in your account — NOT the public database). Returns contacts you've enriched or added with the labels and stage info.

tools.name: apollo_create_contact
tools.description: Create or update a contact in YOUR Apollo CRM. Pass first_name + last_name + email at minimum. label_names auto-creates labels.

tools.name: apollo_list_contact_stages
tools.description: List your account's contact stages (Cold/Working/Replied/Customer/etc.). Required for composing contact_stage_id values.

tools.name: apollo_list_email_sequences
tools.description: List outreach sequences. Each sequence has id, name, num_steps, status (active/paused/archived), num_active_steps.

tools.name: apollo_add_contact_to_sequence
tools.description: Enroll a contact in an outreach sequence. Required: contact_ids (array, max 10) + emailer_campaign_id + send_email_from_email_account_id. The send-from email account must be already configured in Apollo.

contact_ids.description: Array of contact IDs (max 10 per call).

send_email_from_email_account_id.description: Email account ID to send from (set up in Apollo UI).

sequence_no_email.description: If true, the contact's email is unverified — Apollo skips email-step actions but runs other step types (LinkedIn, calls).

tools.name: apollo_list_email_accounts
tools.description: List email accounts connected to Apollo (used as sending identities for sequences). Returns id, email, user_id, active flag.
